data.title: XRP price drops 19% but analysts say it’s a ‘healthy correction’
data.description:
XRP price is down today due to overheated conditions, but analysts say it’s a normal market pullback that could precede a stronger rebound in the short term.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/xrp-price-drops-19-percent-analysts-say-healthy-correction-with-10-30-still-in-sight?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Chain Detective ZachXBT: Some projects run Yaps activities to attract low-quality users and AI-generated content, which will only dilute brand value
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Chain Detective ZachXBT posted on his personal channel that some projects currently attract low-quality users and AI-generated content by running Yaps activities, which dilutes the brand value and fails to bring long-term funds and real user growth. He called on the community to actively block related projects and question false data indicators to curb the phenomenon of "flooding of low-quality content" in the ecosystem.

data.title: A dormant BTC address for 14.5 years was activated, holding nearly 4,000 BTC
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, a dormant address containing 3,962 bitcoins (about 468 million US dollars) has just been activated after 14.5 years of silence.

data.title: 21Shares Partners with Société Générale to Boost ETP Liquidity in Europe
data.description:
According to PANews, 21Shares AG has announced a partnership with Société Générale to enhance the liquidity of its Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) on fund platforms in Germany and Eastern Europe. This agreement will see Société Générale providing over-the-counter liquidity for 21Shares' Bitcoin and Ethereum ETPs, specifically ABTC, CBTC, AETH, and CETH, on major fund platforms in these regions. The collaboration aims to make 21Shares' flagship cryptocurrency products more accessible to a broader range of professional investors, thereby expanding its institutional reach in Germany and Eastern Europe. This strategic move is expected to significantly improve the trading experience for investors in these markets
source: https://www.binance.com/en/square/post/27357191233417?utm_source=BinanceNewsRSS

data.title: Hong Kong to criminalize unlicensed stablecoin promotions from Aug. 1
data.description:
Starting Aug. 1, offering or advertising unlicensed stablecoins to retail investors in Hong Kong could land violators with a $50,000 Hong Kong dollars fine and six months in jail.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/hong-kong-stablecoin-law-august-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Murakami's NFT Series '108 Flowers Revised' Launches During Onchain Summer
data.description: According to BlockBeats, renowned contemporary artist Takashi Murakami announced on social media that his NFT series, '108 Flowers Revised,' inspired by his physical art collection, will be officially launched during the Onchain Summer event. The series is now available on the blockchain, and users can mint it directly through the Base app.Minting will commence at 9 a.m. on August 1, Japan time (5 p.m. on July 31, Pacific Time).

data.title: 21Shares Partners with Société Générale to Boost ETP Liquidity in Europe
data.description: According to PANews, 21Shares AG has announced a partnership with Société Générale to enhance the liquidity of its Exchange Traded Products (ETPs) on fund platforms in Germany and Eastern Europe. data.title: Solana developers consider increasing block limit by 66% to 100 million computational units to further increase network capacity
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Solana developers are considering raising the block limit from 60 million computing units to 100 million computing units through the SIMD-0286 proposal, which will achieve a 66% capacity increase, provided that validators choose to join the upgrade. The proposal aims to further increase the capacity of the Solana network, allowing more transactions per second to be processed. The computing unit is the basic unit for measuring transaction complexity and resource consumption in the Solana network. Increasing the block computing unit limit will directly enhance the network's transaction processing capabilities. (The Block)

data.title: Bitget Research Institute: The Altcoin Season Index shows an upward trend, and funds may rotate to altcoins in the short term
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitget Research Institute Chief Analyst Ryan Lee said that Bitcoin's dominance has recently fallen back to the 59%-61% range, and the altcoin season index is on an upward trend, indicating that funds are rotating to mainstream altcoins such as Ethereum, XRP, and Solana, and related assets have risen by 20%-40% recently.
Ryan Lee pointed out that "the active performance of sectors such as AI, RWA, and Memecoin also shows that the market is paying close attention to specific narratives. However, the altcoin season index has not yet broken through the 75% confirmation threshold, and the current market is more likely to be a phased rotation rather than a fully launched altcoin season. If the market is to continue to the middle and late third quarter, the key lies in whether Bitcoin's market share can continue to be below 60%. At the same time, institutional capital inflows, favorable regulations, and improved fundamentals of Layer1 and DeFi sectors are all important signals to confirm the launch of the altcoin season."

data.title: UK and India Sign Landmark Free Trade Agreement
data.description: According to PANews, the United Kingdom and India have officially signed a free trade agreement, eliminating tariffs on various products, including automobiles and alcoholic beverages. This agreement, reached after three years of negotiations, marks the largest trade deal for the UK since Brexit and the most significant trade agreement for India in a decade. Under the terms of the agreement, 90% of tariff items on UK exports to India will be reduced, with 85% becoming completely duty-free within ten years. Similarly, 99% of tariff items on Indian exports to the UK will receive reductions. The deal is expected to boost the UK economy by £4.8 billion annually and foster long-term trade growth between the two nations.

data.title: Binance to Launch Fee Promotion for USDT-Margined Perpetual Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce a new fee promotion aimed at enhancing the trading experience for USDT-margined perpetual contracts. This initiative is part of Binance's ongoing efforts to create a more accessible and liquid derivatives market. The promotion will be available during the first 10 days of each new contract's launch, referred to as the 'Incentive Period.' During this time, all users will benefit from a 0% maker fee, while qualified liquidity providers will receive higher maker rebates.

The promotion is scheduled to run from 2025-07-25 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-10-25 23:59 (UTC). For all users, the maker fee will be set at 0% from the contract launch day, considered Day 0, until Day 9 at 23:59 (UTC). Qualified liquidity providers will enjoy a maker fee of -0.006% (-0.6 bps) during the Incentive Period. After this period, standard fee rates based on VIP level or liquidity provider tier will apply. To participate in the Binance Futures Liquidity Provider Program, users must have a minimum futures trading volume of $100,000,000 equivalent or a minimum spot trading volume of $20,000,000 equivalent over a 30-day period on Binance or other platforms. Successful applicants will receive a four-week grace period with Tier 2 maker fee rebates on USDT-Margined Futures Contracts, exempt from weekly reviews.

Binance will announce new USDT-margined futures perpetual contracts eligible for the promotion in the corresponding listing announcement. It is important to note that liquidity providers newly qualifying during the Incentive Period will not receive the promotional maker fee rebate for trades on that contract. Only those already qualified at the time of the contract listing will automatically receive the rebate benefit. Sub-accounts created during the Incentive Period will not be eligible for the promotional fee rate. Once the Incentive Period concludes, fee rates will revert to standard levels, with a possible short period of higher-than-standard maker rebates due to timing adjustments. All trading volumes and metrics related to the promotion are measured by Binance at its discretion, and self-trades will be excluded from volume calculations. Binance reserves the right to amend or terminate the promotion or its rules at its discretion.

data.title: SenseTime Group Announces Share Placement to Raise HK$25 Billion
data.description: According to Odaily, SenseTime Group has announced a placement of 1.667 billion new Class B shares at a price of HK$1.5 per share, aiming to raise approximately HK$25 billion. The company plans to use part of the net proceeds to explore the integration and application of artificial intelligence in innovative vertical fields. This includes, but is not limited to, developing embodied intelligent robots, blockchain, real-world assets (RWA), digital assets, and stablecoins, either independently or in collaboration with strategic partners. Additionally, the funds will be allocated for general operational purposes.

data.title: Machi Big Brother Closes ETH Position with Significant Loss
data.description: According to Foresight News, Machi Big Brother, also known as Huang Licheng, recently closed a position of 1,229 ETH, incurring a loss of $80,000. Despite this, his remaining positions in ETH, PUMP, and HYPE are still showing an unrealized loss of $8.711 million.

data.title: SlowMist CISO: The core administrator of XSS.is, the world's largest dark web crime platform, was arrested
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - SlowMist Technology Chief Information Security Officer (CISO) 23pds posted on the X platform that the core administrator of XSS.is, the world's largest dark web crime platform, has been arrested. The platform has been active for a long time and is one of the main trading places for Stealer tools (information stealers) in the cryptocurrency industry.

data.title: XRP vs. XLM: Is It Really a Choice… or Are Both Worth Holding?
data.description:
When comparing the two cryptocurrencies, XRP and XLM, one might wonder whether the decision comes down to a simple choice between the two options, or if each offers unique benefits that make holding both of them worthwhile in a diversified investment portfolio. The dynamics of their underlying technologies, use cases, and market performance should be carefully considered to determine their individual value and the potential advantages of investing in them simultaneously. As the cryptocurrency landscape continues to evolve, understanding the distinctions and similarities between XRP and XLM can provide deeper insights into their long-term viability and relevance in the rapidly changing financial ecosystem.
source: https://blocknews.com/xrp-vs-xlm-is-it-really-a-choice-or-are-both-worth-holding/

data.title: Analysis: The unusual dollar trend may be another reason why Powell is cautious about rate cuts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to foreign media analysis, under the influence of tariff policies, Federal Reserve Chairman Powell insisted on waiting for more evidence before cutting interest rates to show that inflation has not soared. In addition, another reason why Powell needs to act cautiously is that the trend of the US dollar is extremely abnormal. Before the tariff policy was announced, the market generally expected that tariffs would strengthen the US dollar. But the reality is that the US dollar is depreciating. Since "Liberation Day" on April 2, the US dollar index has fallen 6.8%, and has fallen about 10.4% so far in 2025, the worst year-to-date performance in at least 25 years. The persistent weakness of the US dollar is more likely to have a significant impact on the economy, including consumer prices. (Jinshi)

data.title: Crypto mining company Bitzero raises $25 million to expand its mining operations
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Bitzero, a crypto mining company backed by Kevin O’Leary, recently received US$25 million in financing, which it plans to use to expand its mining operations. The company said that the first batch of funds will be used to purchase 2,900 Bitmain S21 Pro mining machines, which are expected to be deployed within four to six months, bringing the company approximately US$10 million in new revenue each year. At the same time, Bitzero is committed to using hydropower and low-carbon energy to promote the sustainable development of its data centers in North America and Europe. Mohammed Bakhashwain, president and CEO of the company, said the financing will accelerate the deployment of leading mining technology and further consolidate Bitzero's leading position in sustainable and profitable data centers. (The Block)

data.title: Fed Chair Powell Awaits Inflation Evidence Before Rate Cuts Amid Unusual Dollar Trends
data.description:
According to Odaily, U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell is exercising caution in reducing interest rates, opting to wait for more evidence that inflation is not surging. This decision is influenced by the unusual behavior of the U.S. dollar, which has depreciated contrary to expectations following the announcement of tariff policies. 

Before the tariffs were announced, the market widely anticipated that these measures would strengthen the dollar. However, the dollar has weakened, with the dollar index dropping 6.8% since April 2, known as 'Liberation Day,' and declining approximately 10.4% in 2025 so far. This marks the worst year-to-date performance in at least 25 years. 

The persistent weakness of the dollar is likely to have significant implications for the economy, including consumer prices.
